CRP Categories -- sample fixture for tests (structure mirrors the real file)
Documentation preamble line that the parser must skip.

Catcode	Catname	Catorder	Industry	Sector	Sector Long
A1000	Crop production & basic processing	A01	Crop Production & Basic Processing	Agribusiness	Agribusiness
